/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG  -shared -Wl,-soname,libggml.so.0 -o libggml.so.0.9.8 CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-dl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-reg.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/apr/Personal/cpp-edge-audio/runtime/cpp/build_tests/whisper_build/ggml/src: -ldl libggml-cpu.so.0.9.8 libggml-base.so.0.9.8
